Luhan Tang

2026-03-07

library(splines)

select <- dplyr::select
theme_set(theme_minimal())
set.seed(123)
load("housing.rdata")
loaded_objs <- ls()
cat("Objects loaded:", paste(loaded_objs, collapse = ", "), "\n")
## Objects loaded: housing_data, select
df <- housing_data

cat("Using object: housing_data |", nrow(df), "rows x", ncol(df), "cols\n")
## Using object: housing_data | 506 rows x 19 cols
cat("Columns:", paste(names(df), collapse = ", "), "\n")
## Columns: town, tract, lon, lat, medv, cmedv, crim, zn, indus, chas, nox, rm, age, dis, rad, tax, ptratio, b, lstat
dim(df)
## [1] 506  19
str(df)
## 'data.frame':    506 obs. of  19 variables:
##  $ town   : Factor w/ 92 levels "Arlington","Ashland",..: 54 77 77 46 46 46 69 69 69 69 ...
##  $ tract  : int  2011 2021 2022 2031 2032 2033 2041 2042 2043 2044 ...
##  $ lon    : num  -71 -71 -70.9 -70.9 -70.9 ...
##  $ lat    : num  42.3 42.3 42.3 42.3 42.3 ...

##  $ indus  : num  2.31 7.07 7.07 2.18 2.18 NA NA NA 7.87 NA ...

head(df)

##      rm  age    dis rad tax ptratio      b lstat
## 1 6.575 65.2     NA   1 296    15.3 396.90  4.98
## 2 6.421 78.9     NA   2 242    17.8 396.90    NA

## 5 7.147 54.2 6.0622   3 222    18.7 396.90  5.33
## 6 6.430 58.7 6.0622   3 222    18.7 394.12  5.21
cat("\nColumn names in dataset:\n")
## 
## Column names in dataset:
print(names(df))
##  [1] "town"    "tract"   "lon"     "lat"     "medv"    "cmedv"   "crim"   
##  [8] "zn"      "indus"   "chas"    "nox"     "rm"      "age"     "dis"    
## [15] "rad"     "tax"     "ptratio" "b"       "lstat"
if ("chas" %in% names(df)) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(chas = factor(chas, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")))
}

numeric_cols <- c("crim", "zn", "indus", "nox", "rm", "age",
                  "dis", "rad", "tax", "ptratio", "b", "lstat",
                  "cmedv", "lon", "lat")
numeric_cols <- intersect(numeric_cols, names(df))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(numeric_cols), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.))))

cat("Numeric coercion applied to:", paste(numeric_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
## Numeric coercion applied to: crim, zn, indus, nox, rm, age, dis, rad, tax, ptratio, b, lstat, cmedv, lon, lat
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    log_crim  = ifelse(!is.na(crim), log(crim + 1), NA_real_),
    log_nox   = ifelse(!is.na(nox), log(nox), NA_real_),
    log_lstat = ifelse(!is.na(lstat), log(lstat), NA_real_),
    log_dis   = ifelse(!is.na(dis), log(dis), NA_real_),
    log_cmedv = ifelse(!is.na(cmedv), log(cmedv), NA_real_)
  )
if (all(c("lon", "lat") %in% names(df))) {
  cat("Longitude and latitude are available and will be used in the spatial model.\n")
} else {
  cat("Longitude/latitude not found; spatial model cannot be fit as planned.\n")
}
## Longitude and latitude are available and will be used in the spatial model.
stopifnot(all(c("cmedv", "log_cmedv") %in% names(df)))

# Variables used in EDA
cont_vars_eda <- c("log_nox", "rm", "log_lstat", "log_crim",
                   "age", "log_dis", "ptratio", "b")
cont_vars_eda <- intersect(cont_vars_eda, names(df))

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
hist(df$cmedv, breaks = 30, main = "cmedv (raw)",
     xlab = "Median Home Value", col = "steelblue")
hist(df$log_cmedv, breaks = 30, main = "log(cmedv)",
     xlab = "log Median Home Value", col = "coral")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

cat("\n--- Ceiling check at cmedv = 50 ---\n")
## 
## --- Ceiling check at cmedv = 50 ---
print(table(df$cmedv == 50, useNA = "ifany"))
## 
## FALSE  TRUE  <NA> 
##   444    15    47
sum_vars <- intersect(c("cmedv","nox","rm","lstat","crim","age","dis",
                        "rad","tax","ptratio","b","zn","indus","chas","lon","lat"),
                      names(df))
cat("\n--- Summary table ---\n")
## 
## --- Summary table ---
print(summary(df %>% dplyr::select(all_of(sum_vars))))
##      cmedv            nox               rm            lstat       
##  Min.   : 5.00   Min.   :0.3890   Min.   :3.561   Min.   : 1.730  
##  1st Qu.:16.65   1st Qu.:0.4370   1st Qu.:6.023   1st Qu.: 6.628

##  1st Qu.: 0.05679   1st Qu.: 34.50   1st Qu.: 2.581   1st Qu.: 4.000  
##  Median : 0.13425   Median : 61.50   Median : 3.917   Median : 5.000  
##  Mean   : 1.81620   Mean   : 60.07   Mean   : 4.369   Mean   : 6.449  
##  3rd Qu.: 0.62135   3rd Qu.: 87.30   3rd Qu.: 5.874   3rd Qu.: 6.000  
##  Max.   :67.92080   Max.   :100.00   Max.   :12.127   Max.   :24.000  
##  NA's   :172        NA's   :189      NA's   :165      NA's   :219     
##       tax           ptratio            b                zn       
##  Min.   :187.0   Min.   :12.60   Min.   :  0.32   Min.   : 0.00  
##  1st Qu.:279.0   1st Qu.:16.60   1st Qu.:375.38   1st Qu.: 0.00

##  3rd Qu.:666.0   3rd Qu.:19.90   3rd Qu.:396.23   3rd Qu.:21.25  
##  Max.   :711.0   Max.   :22.00   Max.   :396.90   Max.   :95.00  
##                  NA's   :171                      NA's   :170    
##      indus          chas          lon              lat       
##  Min.   : 0.460   No  :273   Min.   :-71.29   Min.   :42.03  
##  1st Qu.: 4.050   Yes : 23   1st Qu.:-71.09   1st Qu.:42.18  
##  Median : 6.910   NA's:210   Median :-71.05   Median :42.22  
##  Mean   : 9.275              Mean   :-71.06   Mean   :42.22  
##  3rd Qu.:13.920              3rd Qu.:-71.02   3rd Qu.:42.25  
##  Max.   :27.740              Max.   :-70.81   Max.   :42.38  
##  NA's   :180
if (length(cont_vars_eda) > 0) {
  df_long <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(cont_vars_eda)) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

  print(
    ggplot(df_long, aes(x = value)) +
      geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
      facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free") +
      labs(title = "Distribution of EDA Variables", x = NULL, y = "Count")
  )
}
## Warning: Removed 1199 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_bin()`).

if (length(cont_vars_eda) > 0) {
  print(
    df %>%
      dplyr::select(log_cmedv, all_of(cont_vars_eda)) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(-log_cmedv, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = value, y = log_cmedv)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
      geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
      facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_x") +
      labs(title = "log(cmedv) vs Predictors (LOESS)", x = NULL, y = "log(cmedv)")
  )
}
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
## Warning: Removed 1485 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_smooth()`).
## Warning: Removed 1485 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_point()`).

eda_vars <- intersect(c("log_cmedv", cont_vars_eda), names(df))
num_df <- df %>% dplyr::select(all_of(eda_vars)) %>% na.omit()

if (nrow(num_df) > 5) {
  cor_mat <- cor(num_df, method = "pearson")
  corrplot(cor_mat, method = "color", type = "lower",
           addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.6,
           tl.cex = 0.75, title = "Correlation Matrix",
           mar = c(0, 0, 2, 0))
}

if ("chas" %in% names(df)) {
  print(
    ggplot(df, aes(x = chas, y = log_cmedv, fill = chas)) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
      labs(title = "log(cmedv) by Charles River Adjacency",
           x = "Bounds Charles River", y = "log(cmedv)") +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
  )
}
## Warning: Removed 47 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_boxplot()`).

if (all(c("lon", "lat", "log_cmedv") %in% names(df))) {
  print(
    ggplot(df, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = log_cmedv)) +
      geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
      labs(title = "Spatial distribution of log(cmedv)",
           x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude", color = "log(cmedv)")
  )
}

cat("\n========== EDA complete ==========\n")
## 
## ========== EDA complete ==========
vars_diag <- c("log_cmedv", "log_nox", "rm", "log_lstat", "log_crim",
               "age", "log_dis", "ptratio", "b", "chas",
               "rad", "tax", "zn", "indus", "lon", "lat")
vars_diag <- intersect(vars_diag, names(df))

df_diag <- df %>% dplyr::select(all_of(vars_diag))

cat("\n--- Missing value summary (%) ---\n")
## 
## --- Missing value summary (%) ---
miss_summary <- df_diag %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct_missing") %>%
  arrange(desc(pct_missing))
print(miss_summary)
## # A tibble: 16 × 2
##    variable  pct_missing
##    <chr>           <dbl>
##  1 rm              45.3 
##  2 rad             43.3 
##  3 log_nox         42.9 
##  4 chas            41.5 
##  5 age             37.4 
##  6 indus           35.6 
##  7 log_crim        34.0 
##  8 ptratio         33.8 
##  9 zn              33.6 
## 10 log_dis         32.6 
## 11 log_lstat       11.1 
## 12 log_cmedv        9.29
## 13 b                0   
## 14 tax              0   
## 15 lon              0   
## 16 lat              0
vars_with_miss <- miss_summary %>% filter(pct_missing > 0) %>% pull(variable)

if (length(vars_with_miss) > 0) {
  cat("\nVariables with missing data:", paste(vars_with_miss, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  print(vis_miss(df_diag) + labs(title = "Missingness Pattern"))
  print(gg_miss_var(df_diag) + labs(title = "% Missing per Variable"))
}
## 
## Variables with missing data: rm, rad, log_nox, chas, age, indus, log_crim, ptratio, zn, log_dis, log_lstat, log_cmedv

mcar_result <- tryCatch(
  naniar::mcar_test(df_diag),
  error = function(e) { cat("MCAR test error:", conditionMessage(e), "\n"); NULL }
)
if (!is.null(mcar_result)) print(mcar_result)
## # A tibble: 1 × 4
##   statistic    df   p.value missing.patterns
##       <dbl> <dbl>     <dbl>            <int>
## 1     3458.  3121 0.0000181              289
# ── 8. Missingness decision-tree diagnostics ────────────────
miss_tree_fit <- function(var, data) {
  r <- as.integer(is.na(data[[var]]))
  if (mean(r) == 0 || mean(r) == 1) return(NULL)

  predictors <- setdiff(names(data), var)

  df_sub <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(predictors)) %>%
    mutate(R = factor(r, levels = c(0, 1)))

  fit <- rpart(
    R ~ .,
    data = df_sub,
    method = "class",
    na.action = na.rpart,
    model = TRUE,
    control = rpart.control(cp = 0.01, maxdepth = 3, minsplit = 20)
  )

  pred <- predict(fit, type = "class")
  acc  <- mean(pred == df_sub$R, na.rm = TRUE)

  list(tree = fit, acc = acc, n = nrow(df_sub), miss_rate = mean(r))
}

cat("\n--- Decision-tree missingness diagnostics ---\n")
## 
## --- Decision-tree missingness diagnostics ---
tree_results <- list()

for (v in vars_with_miss) {
  res <- miss_tree_fit(v, df_diag)
  tree_results[[v]] <- res
  if (is.null(res)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-12s : skipped\n", v))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  %-12s : missing_rate=%.1f%%, n_used=%d, tree_acc=%.3f\n",
                v, 100 * res$miss_rate, res$n, res$acc))
  }
}
##   rm           : missing_rate=45.3%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.779
##   rad          : missing_rate=43.3%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.798
##   log_nox      : missing_rate=42.9%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.791
##   chas         : missing_rate=41.5%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.757
##   age          : missing_rate=37.4%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.777
##   indus        : missing_rate=35.6%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.757
##   log_crim     : missing_rate=34.0%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.777
##   ptratio      : missing_rate=33.8%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.798
##   zn           : missing_rate=33.6%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.767
##   log_dis      : missing_rate=32.6%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.802
##   log_lstat    : missing_rate=11.1%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.889
##   log_cmedv    : missing_rate=9.3%, n_used=506, tree_acc=0.911
# Show one illustrative tree: highest missing variable
if (length(vars_with_miss) > 0) {
  v_show <- vars_with_miss[1]
  if (!is.null(tree_results[[v_show]])) {
    cat(sprintf("\n--- Example missingness tree for '%s' ---\n", v_show))
    rpart.plot(tree_results[[v_show]]$tree,
               main = paste("Missingness decision tree:", v_show),
               type = 4, extra = 104, fallen.leaves = TRUE)
  }
}
## 
## --- Example missingness tree for 'rm' ---

predictor_pool <- c("log_cmedv", "log_nox", "rm", "log_lstat", "log_crim",
                    "age", "log_dis", "ptratio", "b", "chas",
                    "rad", "tax", "zn", "indus", "lon", "lat")
predictor_pool <- intersect(predictor_pool, names(df_diag))

logit_results <- list()

for (v in vars_with_miss) {
  this_preds <- setdiff(predictor_pool, v)
  if (length(this_preds) == 0) next

  dat_glm <- df_diag %>%
    mutate(R_obs = as.integer(!is.na(.data[[v]]))) %>%
    dplyr::select(R_obs, all_of(this_preds)) %>%
    drop_na()

  if (nrow(dat_glm) < 50 || length(unique(dat_glm$R_obs)) < 2) {
    cat(sprintf("%-12s : skipped (insufficient complete rows)\n", v))
    next
  }

  fit_glm <- tryCatch(
    glm(R_obs ~ ., data = dat_glm, family = binomial),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(fit_glm)) {
    cat(sprintf("%-12s : model failed\n", v))
    next
  }

  # Use Wald CI (manual) for stability; profile-likelihood CI can fail for some fits.
  tidy_glm <- broom::tidy(fit_glm) %>%
    mutate(
      conf.low = estimate - 1.96 * std.error,
      conf.high = estimate + 1.96 * std.error,
      OR = exp(estimate),
      OR_low = exp(conf.low),
      OR_high = exp(conf.high)
    ) %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    arrange(p.value) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, OR, OR_low, OR_high, std.error, statistic, p.value)

  logit_results[[v]] <- tidy_glm

  cat(sprintf("\n%s | n=%d | missing=%.1f%%\n", v, nrow(dat_glm), mean(is.na(df_diag[[v]])) * 100))
  print(head(tidy_glm, 8))
}
## 
## rm | n=73 | missing=45.3%
## # A tibble: 8 × 7
##   term             OR  OR_low      OR_high std.error statistic p.value
##   <chr>         <dbl>   <dbl>        <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 age          0.903  0.837          0.975    0.0387     -2.63 0.00860
## 2 rad          1.83   1.04           3.23     0.290       2.08 0.0374 
## 3 b            0.784  0.616          0.998    0.123      -1.98 0.0478 
## 4 indus        0.674  0.445          1.02     0.211      -1.87 0.0613 
## 5 log_lstat   66.5    0.748       5908.       2.29        1.83 0.0668 
## 6 chasYes      0.0421 0.00121        1.47     1.81       -1.75 0.0804 
## 7 log_cmedv 3444.     0.300   39537968.       4.77        1.71 0.0877 
## 8 tax          0.984  0.960          1.01     0.0125     -1.26 0.206
## Warning: glm.fit: algorithm did not converge
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## rad | n=66 | missing=43.3%
## # A tibble: 8 × 7
##   term            OR OR_low OR_high std.error statistic p.value
##   <chr>        <dbl>  <dbl>   <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 log_dis  3.64e+168      0     Inf   194649.  0.00199    0.998
## 2 zn       2.23e-  1      0     Inf     1448. -0.00103    0.999
## 3 log_nox  6.46e+210      0     Inf   587798.  0.000826   0.999
## 4 lat      6.82e+307      0     Inf   890538.  0.000796   0.999
## 5 ptratio  3.77e-  7      0     Inf    19971. -0.000741   0.999
## 6 rm       9.81e+ 73      0     Inf   261452.  0.000652   0.999
## 7 b        1.25e+  1      0     Inf     4000.  0.000632   0.999
## 8 log_crim 1.49e- 34      0     Inf   156651. -0.000497   1.000
## Warning: glm.fit: algorithm did not converge
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## log_nox | n=63 | missing=42.9%
## # A tibble: 8 × 7
##   term            OR OR_low OR_high std.error  statistic p.value
##   <chr>        <dbl>  <dbl>   <dbl>     <dbl>      <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 log_crim  8.81e+84      0     Inf  3025371.  0.0000647   1.000
## 2 rm        2.33e+20      0     Inf  1311856.  0.0000358   1.000

## 2 zn       3.43e-  1      0     Inf     2725. -0.000393   1.000

## 6 tax      6.83e-  1      0     Inf     1942. -0.000196   1.000
## 7 rm       1.94e- 47      0     Inf   617509. -0.000174   1.000
## 8 log_crim 8.70e+ 96      0     Inf  1374155.  0.000162   1.000
## Warning: glm.fit: algorithm did not converge
## Warning: glm.fit: fitted probabilities numerically 0 or 1 occurred
## 
## log_cmedv | n=69 | missing=9.3%
## # A tibble: 8 × 7
##   term              OR OR_low OR_high std.error statistic p.value
##   <chr>          <dbl>  <dbl>   <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 log_crim Inf              0     Inf   367256.   0.00220   0.998
## 2 zn         2.44e+  1      0     Inf     2035.   0.00157   0.999
## 3 lat      Inf              0     Inf   923391.   0.00156   0.999
## 4 b          3.64e-  6      0     Inf     8296.  -0.00151   0.999
## 5 log_dis    6.87e+151      0     Inf   241200.   0.00145   0.999
## 6 rad        6.84e- 19      0     Inf    33787.  -0.00124   0.999
## 7 tax        5.55e-  1      0     Inf      495.  -0.00119   0.999
## 8 indus      5.70e+  7      0     Inf    16958.   0.00105   0.999
vars_mice <- c("cmedv", "nox", "rm", "lstat", "crim", "age", "dis",
               "ptratio", "b", "chas", "lon", "lat", "tax", "rad", "zn", "indus")
vars_mice <- intersect(vars_mice, names(df))

df_mice <- df %>% dplyr::select(all_of(vars_mice))

meth <- make.method(df_mice)
for (v in names(df_mice)) {
  if (is.numeric(df_mice[[v]])) meth[v] <- "pmm"
  if (is.factor(df_mice[[v]]))  meth[v] <- "logreg"
}

pred <- make.predictorMatrix(df_mice)
diag(pred) <- 0

imp <- mice(
  df_mice,
  m = 30,
  method = meth,
  predictorMatrix = pred,
  seed = 123,
  maxit = 20,
  printFlag = FALSE
)
cat("MICE complete.\n")
## MICE complete.
df_clean <- complete(imp, action = 1) %>%
  mutate(
    log_cmedv = log(cmedv),
    log_nox   = log(nox),
    log_lstat = log(lstat),
    log_crim  = log(crim + 1),
    log_dis   = log(dis)
  )
needed_base <- c("cmedv", "nox", "rm", "lstat", "crim", "age", "dis", "ptratio", "b", "chas")
stopifnot(all(needed_base %in% names(df_mice)))

has_spatial <- all(c("lon", "lat") %in% names(df_mice))
cat("Spatial coordinates available:", has_spatial, "\n")
## Spatial coordinates available: TRUE
form_m1 <- as.formula(
  "log(cmedv) ~ splines::ns(log(nox), df = 4) + rm + log(lstat) + log(crim + 1) + age + log(dis) + ptratio + b + chas"
)

fit_m1 <- with(
  imp,
  lm(
    log(cmedv) ~ splines::ns(log(nox), df = 4) + rm + log(lstat) +
      log(crim + 1) + age + log(dis) + ptratio + b + chas
  )
)

cat("\n--- Model 1 complete ---\n")
## 
## --- Model 1 complete ---
imp_list <- complete(imp, action = "all")

fit_m2_list <- list()
if (has_spatial) {
  form_m2 <- update(form_m1, . ~ . + (1 | spatial_cell))

  for (i in seq_along(imp_list)) {
    dat_i <- imp_list[[i]] %>%
      mutate(
        spatial_cell = interaction(
          cut(lon, breaks = 4, include.lowest = TRUE),
          cut(lat, breaks = 4, include.lowest = TRUE),
          drop = TRUE
        )
      )

    fit_m2_list[[i]] <- lme4::lmer(form_m2, data = dat_i, REML = FALSE)
  }

  cat("--- Model 2 complete ---\n")
}
## --- Model 2 complete ---
pool_rubin <- function(beta_mat, vcov_list) {
  M <- nrow(beta_mat)
  qbar <- colMeans(beta_mat)
  W <- Reduce("+", vcov_list) / M
  B <- stats::cov(beta_mat)
  Tmat <- W + (1 + 1 / M) * B

  w_diag <- diag(W)
  b_diag <- diag(B)
  t_diag <- diag(Tmat)
  se <- sqrt(t_diag)

  r <- ((1 + 1 / M) * b_diag) / w_diag
  r[!is.finite(r)] <- NA_real_
  df <- (M - 1) * (1 + 1 / r)^2
  tval <- qbar / se
  pval <- 2 * stats::pt(abs(tval), df = df, lower.tail = FALSE)
  ci_mult <- stats::qt(0.975, df = df)

  tibble(
    term = colnames(beta_mat),
    estimate = qbar,
    std.error = se,
    statistic = tval,
    df = df,
    p.value = pval,
    conf.low = qbar - ci_mult * se,
    conf.high = qbar + ci_mult * se
  )
}

cat("\n--- Pooled estimates: Model 1 (Rubin via mice::pool) ---\n")
## 
## --- Pooled estimates: Model 1 (Rubin via mice::pool) ---
pool_m1 <- pool(fit_m1)
pool_m1_tbl <- summary(pool_m1, conf.int = TRUE)
print(pool_m1_tbl)
##                              term      estimate    std.error   statistic
## 1                     (Intercept)  2.7605198539 0.3585542043  7.69903078
## 2  splines::ns(log(nox), df = 4)1  0.0303575830 0.0749861256  0.40484267
## 3  splines::ns(log(nox), df = 4)2 -0.0046115804 0.1153131034 -0.03999182
## 4  splines::ns(log(nox), df = 4)3 -0.0895951346 0.1879531548 -0.47668864
## 5  splines::ns(log(nox), df = 4)4 -0.2251831053 0.1524722086 -1.47687967
## 6                              rm  0.2214701381 0.0347747499  6.36870543
## 7                      log(lstat) -0.2557662695 0.0409109837 -6.25177511
## 8                   log(crim + 1) -0.1257536501 0.0265229781 -4.74130957
## 9                             age -0.0004201637 0.0008233705 -0.51029720
## 10                       log(dis) -0.1234520633 0.0613332145 -2.01280928
## 11                        ptratio -0.0220407495 0.0073044047 -3.01746009
## 12                              b  0.0003840480 0.0001422810  2.69922205
## 13                        chasYes  0.0038633238 0.0429167415  0.09001904
##           df      p.value         2.5 %        97.5 %      conf.low
## 1   42.54430 1.360776e-09  2.0372023393  3.4838373686  2.0372023393
## 2  100.91386 6.864500e-01 -0.1183962584  0.1791114244 -0.1183962584
## 3   56.42799 9.682408e-01 -0.2355728268  0.2263496659 -0.2355728268
## 4   75.46475 6.349613e-01 -0.4639792274  0.2847889582 -0.4639792274
## 5   45.44159 1.466051e-01 -0.5321955507  0.0818293401 -0.5321955507
## 6   37.42521 1.897750e-07  0.1510368143  0.2919034619  0.1510368143
## 7   56.23675 5.814820e-08 -0.3377132048 -0.1738193342 -0.3377132048
## 8   52.18807 1.680593e-05 -0.1789713345 -0.0725359656 -0.1789713345
## 9   61.83641 6.116601e-01 -0.0020661444  0.0012258171 -0.0020661444
## 10  40.92210 5.074595e-02 -0.2473241641  0.0004200374 -0.2473241641
## 11  69.34778 3.562865e-03 -0.0366113345 -0.0074701646 -0.0366113345
## 12  87.16168 8.346821e-03  0.0001012565  0.0006668395  0.0001012565
## 13  60.86523 9.285677e-01 -0.0819578477  0.0896844953 -0.0819578477
##        conf.high
## 1   3.4838373686
## 2   0.1791114244
## 3   0.2263496659
## 4   0.2847889582
## 5   0.0818293401
## 6   0.2919034619
## 7  -0.1738193342
## 8  -0.0725359656
## 9   0.0012258171
## 10  0.0004200374
## 11 -0.0074701646
## 12  0.0006668395
## 13  0.0896844953
if (has_spatial) {
  beta_names <- names(lme4::fixef(fit_m2_list[[1]]))
  beta_mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(fit_m2_list, function(fm) lme4::fixef(fm)[beta_names]))
  vcov_list <- lapply(
    fit_m2_list,
    function(fm) {
      v <- as.matrix(vcov(fm))
      v[beta_names, beta_names, drop = FALSE]
    }
  )

  cat("\n--- Pooled estimates: Model 2 (Rubin manual for mixed model fixed effects) ---\n")
  pool_m2_tbl <- pool_rubin(beta_mat, vcov_list)
  print(pool_m2_tbl)
}
## 
## --- Pooled estimates: Model 2 (Rubin manual for mixed model fixed effects) ---
## # A tibble: 13 × 8
##    term           estimate std.error statistic    df  p.value conf.low conf.high
##    <chr>             <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl> <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>
##  1 (Intercept)     2.69e+0  0.354      7.59     59.5 2.56e-10  1.98e+0  3.40    
##  2 splines::ns(l…  3.79e-2  0.0753     0.503   185.  6.16e- 1 -1.11e-1  0.187   
##  3 splines::ns(l…  5.37e-4  0.113      0.00476  82.8 9.96e- 1 -2.24e-1  0.225   
##  4 splines::ns(l… -8.16e-2  0.187     -0.436   117.  6.64e- 1 -4.53e-1  0.289   
##  5 splines::ns(l… -1.97e-1  0.150     -1.32     64.1 1.92e- 1 -4.96e-1  0.101   
##  6 rm              2.18e-1  0.0344     6.35     52.2 5.31e- 8  1.49e-1  0.287   
##  7 log(lstat)     -2.48e-1  0.0398    -6.24     80.5 1.91e- 8 -3.27e-1 -0.169   
##  8 log(crim + 1)  -1.25e-1  0.0257    -4.87     76.5 5.99e- 6 -1.77e-1 -0.0740  
##  9 age            -3.82e-4  0.000792  -0.483    93.8 6.30e- 1 -1.96e-3  0.00119 
## 10 log(dis)       -1.16e-1  0.0657    -1.77     54.5 8.24e- 2 -2.48e-1  0.0155  
## 11 ptratio        -2.01e-2  0.00731   -2.75     95.7 7.22e- 3 -3.46e-2 -0.00555 
## 12 b               4.50e-4  0.000143   3.14    123.  2.13e- 3  1.66e-4  0.000734
## 13 chasYes        -1.54e-3  0.0422    -0.0365   85.9 9.71e- 1 -8.55e-2  0.0824
cat("\n--- Model comparison across imputations ---\n")
## 
## --- Model comparison across imputations ---
if (has_spatial) {
  model_compare <- tibble(
    imputation = seq_along(fit_m2_list),
    AIC_m1 = sapply(fit_m1$analyses, AIC),
    AIC_m2 = sapply(fit_m2_list, AIC)
  ) %>%
    mutate(delta_AIC = AIC_m1 - AIC_m2)

  print(model_compare)
  cat("\nAverage delta AIC (positive favors spatial random-effect model):\n")
  print(mean(model_compare$delta_AIC, na.rm = TRUE))
}
## # A tibble: 30 × 4
##    imputation AIC_m1 AIC_m2 delta_AIC
##         <int>  <dbl>  <dbl>     <dbl>
##  1          1  -248.  -258.      9.83
##  2          2  -213.  -223.      9.68
##  3          3  -286.  -295.      9.10
##  4          4  -262.  -267.      5.71
##  5          5  -280.  -290.     10.1 
##  6          6  -309.  -313.      4.77
##  7          7  -283.  -295.     12.0 
##  8          8  -292.  -297.      4.85
##  9          9  -248.  -259.     10.4 
## 10         10  -291.  -295.      3.40
## # ℹ 20 more rows
## 
## Average delta AIC (positive favors spatial random-effect model):
## [1] 7.499168
miss_pct <- colMeans(is.na(df_mice)) * 100
sens_candidates <- c("cmedv", "nox", "lstat", "dis")
sens_candidates <- intersect(sens_candidates, names(miss_pct))
sens_candidates <- sens_candidates[miss_pct[sens_candidates] > 0]

if (!has_spatial || length(sens_candidates) == 0) {
  cat("Sensitivity analysis skipped (requires spatial model + missing numeric target).\n")
} else {
  sens_var <- if ("cmedv" %in% sens_candidates) "cmedv" else sens_candidates[1]
  mis_idx <- is.na(df_mice[[sens_var]])
  obs_sd <- sd(df_mice[[sens_var]], na.rm = TRUE)

  delta_grid_sd <- c(-0.5, -0.25, 0, 0.25, 0.5)

  adjust_bounds <- function(dat, v) {
    if (v %in% c("cmedv", "nox", "lstat", "dis")) dat[[v]] <- pmax(dat[[v]], 1e-4)
    if (v == "crim") dat[[v]] <- pmax(dat[[v]], -0.999)
    dat
  }

  sens_rows <- list()
  for (k in seq_along(delta_grid_sd)) {
    d_sd <- delta_grid_sd[k]
    d_raw <- d_sd * obs_sd

    fit_delta <- list()
    for (i in seq_along(imp_list)) {
      dat_i <- imp_list[[i]]
      dat_i[[sens_var]][mis_idx] <- dat_i[[sens_var]][mis_idx] + d_raw
      dat_i <- adjust_bounds(dat_i, sens_var)

      dat_i <- dat_i %>%
        mutate(
          spatial_cell = interaction(
            cut(lon, breaks = 4, include.lowest = TRUE),
            cut(lat, breaks = 4, include.lowest = TRUE),
            drop = TRUE
          )
        )

      fit_delta[[i]] <- lme4::lmer(form_m2, data = dat_i, REML = FALSE)
    }

    beta_names <- names(lme4::fixef(fit_delta[[1]]))
    beta_mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(fit_delta, function(fm) lme4::fixef(fm)[beta_names]))
    vcov_list <- lapply(
      fit_delta,
      function(fm) {
        v <- as.matrix(vcov(fm))
        v[beta_names, beta_names, drop = FALSE]
      }
    )
    pool_delta <- pool_rubin(beta_mat, vcov_list)

    nox_idx <- grepl("splines::ns\\(log\\(nox\\), df = 4\\)", pool_delta$term)
    nox_signal <- sqrt(sum(pool_delta$estimate[nox_idx]^2))

    sens_rows[[k]] <- tibble(
      variable = sens_var,
      delta_sd = d_sd,
      delta_raw = d_raw,
      nox_spline_signal = nox_signal,
      mean_AIC = mean(sapply(fit_delta, AIC))
    )
  }

  sensitivity_results <- bind_rows(sens_rows)
  cat("\nMNAR delta-adjustment sensitivity summary:\n")
  print(sensitivity_results)
}
## 
## MNAR delta-adjustment sensitivity summary:
## # A tibble: 5 × 5
##   variable delta_sd delta_raw nox_spline_signal mean_AIC
##   <chr>       <dbl>     <dbl>             <dbl>    <dbl>
## 1 cmedv       -0.5      -4.60             0.193    -90.8
## 2 cmedv       -0.25     -2.30             0.208   -230. 
## 3 cmedv        0         0                0.217   -277. 
## 4 cmedv        0.25      2.30             0.226   -277. 
## 5 cmedv        0.5       4.60             0.235   -247.
